'''havala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zadovite|zadovite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-v-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zadovite|zadovite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| havala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hævælæth|hævælæth]] || [[word:hævælæj|hævælæj]] || [[word:hævælæsh|hævælæsh]] || [[word:hævælæ|hævælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:havavalath|havavalath]] || [[word:havavalaj|havavalaj]] || [[word:havavalash|havavalash]] || [[word:havavala|havavala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:havalath|havalath]] || [[word:havalaj|havalaj]] || [[word:havalash|havalash]] || [[word:havala|havala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:havaflath|havaflath]] || [[word:havaflaj|havaflaj]] || [[word:havaflash|havaflash]] || [[word:havaflaf|havaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:havalatha|havalatha]] || [[word:havalaja|havalaja]] || [[word:havalasha|havalasha]] || [[word:havalaka|havalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:havalath|havalath]] || [[word:havalaj|havalaj]] || [[word:havalash|havalash]] || [[word:havala|havala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:havalathal|havalathal]] || [[word:havalajal|havalajal]] || [[word:havalashal|havalashal]] || [[word:havalakal|havalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:havalathatha|havalathatha]] || [[word:havalajaja|havalajaja]] || [[word:havalashasha|havalashasha]] || [[word:havalaka|havalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:havalathan|havalathan]] || [[word:havalajan|havalajan]] || [[word:havalashan|havalashan]] || [[word:havalakan|havalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:havalathaoro|havalathaoro]] || [[word:havalajaoro|havalajaoro]] || [[word:havalashaoro|havalashaoro]] || [[word:havalakaoro|havalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
